blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,372 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
